text:
23. Intimation to Registrar of revocation of licence issued under section 8.-
Where the licence granted to a company registered under section 8 has been revoked, the company shall apply to the
Registrar in Form No.INC.20 along with the fee to convert its status and change of name accordingly.
section_title: 23. Intimation to Registrar of revocation of licence issued under section 8.-
